title: ilex intermedia
intro: Ilex intermedia, also known as the Manzanita or Mountain Holly, is a plant species native to the western United States and parts of Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ilex intermedia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ilex intermedia typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
